Layer-freezing literature (Rethinking Layer Freezing 2508.15033 + Layer-Freezing Strategies 2509.05490 + GradES 2509.01842 + SmartFRZ) implements the same end-state: prevent destructive gradient flow from upper layers to lower layers. Peri-LN (2502.02732) implements sub-layer-boundary stabilization. The 3-zone layer-group stratification with sill-stop is a positional rearrangement of layer-freezing + boundary normalization.
